title: cranichis ciliilabia
intro: Cranichis ciliilabia, also known as the hairy lip orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid found in the southeastern United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cranichis ciliilabia are said to include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its roots and leaves in water or oil to create teas, salves, and tinctures.
